articles.title: Ctrl Wallet to shut weeks after security exploit
articles.summary: The move follows a June 23 exploit that has now resulted in closing down the wallet, with users urged to withdraw their assets before all functions are disabled on Aug. 3, 2026.

articles.summary: Bitcoin NUPL metric data suggested that BTC price action should make new cycle lows in order to preserve historical patterns.

articles.title: Digital Chamber amicus brief urges dismissal of NY lawsuit over 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
articles.summary: The Digital Chamber filed an amicus brief urging the dismissal of the New York lawsuit seeking ownership of 39,069 dormant Bitcoin wallets, arguing it would set a dangerous precedent for self-custodial wallets.

articles.title: MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins grew 128% before MiCA transition ended, says Decta
articles.summary: Decta's report said the market cap of eight MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins rose to $673.9 million in the year before Europe’s CASP transition period ended.

articles.summary: The report follows comments from White House crypto adviser Patrick Witt in May, who said the administration was examining the legal implications of creating a Bitcoin reserve.

articles.title: BonkDAO reports $20M theft from ‘malicious governance proposal’

articles.summary: The Luxembourg approval completes the company's MiCA licensing process, enabling it to provide regulated crypto-asset services across the European Economic Area.

articles.title: UN agency moves Stellar blockchain payment initiative beyond pilot stage
articles.summary: The UN Development Programme said blockchain payment pilots in five countries cut costs, improved resilience and will now inform wider use across its humanitarian and development programs.

articles.title: TeraWulf shares rise after $19B Anthropic AI lease, JV sale

articles.title: Bitcoin price falls up to 4% on Strategy BTC sale as trader sees Summer 2022 repeat
articles.summary: Bitcoin wiped out much of its latest gains thanks to a market reaction to Strategy's 3,600 BTC sell-off, but analysis eyed a potential buy announcement in the coming days.

articles.title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
articles.summary: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

articles.title: Crypto hacks fell 47% in H1 but ecosystem is no safer: CertiK
articles.summary: Crypto exploits rose 59% quarter-on-quarter to $807.5 million in Q2, due partly to the KelpDAO and Drift Protocol exploits, which came at the hands of North Korean hackers.

articles.title: Strategy sells 3,588 Bitcoin for $216M to fund dividends, keeps $2.55B reserve intact
articles.summary: Strategy sold $216 million in Bitcoin to fund its dividend payments, as wealth manager Bernstein maintained its year-end Bitcoin price target of $150,000.

articles.title: Belgian regulator flags 6 unauthorized crypto providers after MiCA deadline
articles.summary: Belgium’s FSMA warned consumers about six crypto-asset service providers it added to a fraudulent CASP list days after the EU’s MiCA transitional period expired.
